name: The Real Housewives of Gqeberha
overview: Set in a city known for its stunning coastlines and friendly residents, the cast of RHOGQ are ready to show viewers a side to Gqeberha that they have never seen before, one where the circles are tight and where the women bond through power.

trailers.title: The Real Housewives of Gqeberha to land on 1Magic!
